name: StreamFlix
evidence_snippet: Monthly receipt emails found continuously from 2022-03 through 2026-07, $15.49 each.

name: CloudNote Pro
cancel_notes: Canceled 2026-07-10 via cloudnote.example.com/settings/plan > Manage plan > Cancel. Declined a '3 months free' retention offer. Access continues until 2026-07-15, then downgrades to the free tier automatically.

name: FitMetrics
evidence_snippet: Found only via Apple subscriptions page, not Gmail — no receipt email exists for Apple IAP charges.
cancel_notes: needs_review: renews annually on 2027-01-20. User should confirm they still want this before the renewal window closes.
